prompt: A 17th-century Baroque still life painting. A dark, dramatic scene illuminated by a single directional light source. On a wooden table lies an antique brass weighing scale. One side holds a collection of objects including grapes, a fig, a lemon, and gold coins, making it heavier and slightly tilted. The other side is empty. Nearby, additional small brass weights are placed on the table, suggesting an ongoing process of balancing and adjustment. Rich textures of velvet cloth, reflective metal, aged wood, and ripe fruit. Deep shadows, chiaroscuro lighting, highly detailed, painterly style, no text, no modern elements.
metaphor: A weighing scale adjusted with weights to balance uneven loads mirrors tuning model parameters to minimize error.
